commands.label: clarify input
commands.purpose: Inspect authored input before starting a governed packet.

commands.label: start governed packet
commands.purpose: Start a governed packet with explicit mode, risk, zone, owner, and authored input.

commands.label: inspect status
commands.purpose: Inspect packet lifecycle state without changing packet contents.

commands.label: inspect evidence
commands.purpose: Inspect evidence captured for a governed packet.

commands.label: review packet
commands.purpose: Create or use a governed review packet for critique-first review.

commands.label: verify claims
commands.purpose: Create or use a governed verification packet to evaluate claims and evidence.

commands.label: publish packet
commands.purpose: Publish a governed packet only after readiness is established.
